_meta.keyKnowledge: We apply production processes and media concepts to construct media works that communicate ideas and meaning.

_source.w: We apply production processes and media concepts to construct media works that communicate ideas and meaning.
y: Production skills enable us to realise our creative vision through media technologies.
Understanding media concepts helps us construct representations that are intentional and effective.
Developing production competence prepares us for creative work in an increasingly digital world.
eg: We manage the full production process — pre-production, production and post-production.
We apply media concepts like representation, audience and institution to our creative work.
We use camera techniques, editing and sound design to construct meaning in our media work.
We create media work that demonstrates understanding of how codes and conventions create meaning.
We collaborate on a production, taking on different roles — director, editor, sound designer.
We reflect on how our production choices shape the audience's interpretation of our work.
